name: Inspira Technologies Oxy B.H.N. Ltd. Ordinary Shares
summary: Inspira Technologies Oxy B.H.N. Ltd. is a medical technology company developing an innovative respiratory support system, a disruptive technology aiming to elevate Acute Respiratory Distress Syndrome (ARDS) treatment. The company's technology aims to provide a less invasive alternative to mechanical ventilation. Inspira Technologies is based in Ra'anana, Israel.
